title: MineShield Totems
description: Totems with all the players of MineShield 3
body:
# Description
In this resourcepack you will find totems of all MineShield 3 players.
The totems of the current player skins have been added to the resourcepack for now. There are plans to make different versions in the future.

# Note
But you must use [citresewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) if you play on sodium or use [optifine](http://optifine.net) for this resource pack to work.

Table of renaming totems:
| Totem name            | Skin               | Totem name            | Skin               | Totem name            | Skin               | Totem name            | Skin               |
